title: Freshdesk vs Google Meet
description: Compare Freshdesk vs Google Meet — a crm & sales platform versus a communication solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Freshdesk (CRM & Sales) and Google Meet (Communication) serve different primary purposes. Freshdesk has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is crm & sales or communication capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Freshdesk and Google Meet?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk is a crm & sales tool, while Google Meet is a communication platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Freshdesk replace Google Meet?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Freshdesk or Google Meet?
faqs.answer: Freshdesk (Free – $35/agent/mo) and Google Meet (Free (Google Workspace)) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
